title: Vista - All The Cassettes
description: An add-on for Vista that adds a bunch of extra cassettes!
body:
![Title](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1605/737/2026_03_30_0p8_kleki-png.png)
Adds cassette submissions from the Vista Contenst, held in the supplementaries discord server.

Featured cassettes:

- Nerd Radar - by Macro Cheese
- Craftrooms - by MiloTheFriend
- Tetris- by MiloTheFriend
- Herobrine- by Psy-Fi
- Vista Fighter - by Variell
- Smug Kid - by Variell
- Bonfire Steve - by Cyan(ide)
- Best Friends - by Gusta
- Adventure - by CHANKAPAPA
- Baby Ghast - by Maker
- Moon Cycle - by Evil MehVahdJukaar
- Cozy Cove - by ZAM
- Boom Boom Boom - by Gusta
- Golden Moon - by Gusta
- Maze - by Psy-Fi
- Chad - by SepthGear
- Big Brother - by CraftxTD
- Jumpcare - by Moriman
- Copper Golem - by Bluzers
- Void - by Dr.DragonWho
- Mansion - by mrminerman21
- Tower - by HAMAGGOT
- Creeper Run - by IIITyPM_M03r4
- Boat Wobble -  by yum muy
